SEARCH
Package org.key_project.slicing

Class DependencyTracker

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.slicing.DependencyTracker
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProofTreeListener, RuleAppListener
public class DependencyTracker extends Object implements RuleAppListener, ProofTreeListener
Tracks proof steps as they are applied on the proof. Each proof step is recorded in the dependency graph (DependencyGraph).

  • Constructor Summary

    Description
    DependencyTracker(Proof proof)

  • Constructor Details

    • DependencyTracker

      public DependencyTracker(Proof proof)
      Construct a new tracker for a proof. This tracker is added as a RuleAppListener and ProofTreeListener to the proof.
      Parameters:
      proof - the proof to track

  • Method Details

    • ruleApplied

      public void ruleApplied(ProofEvent e)
      Description copied from interface: RuleAppListener
      Invoked when a rule has been applied.
      Specified by:
      ruleApplied in interface RuleAppListener
      Parameters:
      e - the proof event containing the rule application.

    • trackNode

      public void trackNode(Node n)
      Track the specified node. Either this method or ruleApplied(ProofEvent) needs to be called to track a node in the dependency graph.
      Parameters:
      n - the node

    • proofIsBeingPruned

      public void proofIsBeingPruned(ProofTreeEvent e)
      Description copied from interface: ProofTreeListener
      The proof tree under the node mentioned in the ProofTreeEvent is in pruning phase. The subtree of node will be removed after this call but at this point the subtree can still be traversed (e.g. in order to free the nodes in caches). The method proofPruned is called, when the nodes are disconnect from node.
      Specified by:
      proofIsBeingPruned in interface ProofTreeListener
      Parameters:
      e - proof tree event specifying the node to be pruned

    • exportDot

      public String exportDot(boolean abbreviateFormulas, boolean abbreviateChains)
      Export the dependency graph created by this tracker in DOT format. See DotExporter.
      Parameters:
      abbreviateFormulas - whether to shorten formula labels
      abbreviateChains - whether to reduce long chains to one link
      Returns:
      DOT string

    • exportDotAround

      public String exportDotAround(boolean abbreviateFormulas, boolean omitBranch, GraphNode node)
      Export part of the dependency graph around a specific graph node.
      Parameters:
      abbreviateFormulas - whether to shorten formula labels
      omitBranch - whether to omit branch labels
      node - graph node to center export around
      Returns:
      DOT string

    • analyze

      public AnalysisResults analyze(boolean doDependencyAnalysis, boolean doDeduplicateRuleApps)
      Analyze the tracked proof using one or both analysis algorithms. Returns null if the proof is not closed.
      Parameters:
      doDependencyAnalysis - whether to apply the dependency analysis algorithm
      doDeduplicateRuleApps - whether to de-duplicate rule applications
      Returns:
      analysis results (null if proof is not closed)

    • getNodeThatProduced

      public Node getNodeThatProduced(Node currentNode, PosInOccurrence pio)
      Get the proof step that added a sequent formula to the proof.
      Parameters:
      currentNode - the proof node that contains pio
      pio - a sequent formula
      Returns:
      the node that added this formula, or null

    • getAnalysisResults

      public AnalysisResults getAnalysisResults()
      Get the analysis results previously computed.
      Returns:
      analysis results or null (if not yet computed)

    • getDependencyGraph

      public DependencyGraph getDependencyGraph()
      Returns:
      the dependency graph populated by this tracker
